lineage.Process: CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Jalan Provinsi" REMARK "Jalan Arteri Primer" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Jalan Kabupaten" REMARK "Jalan Arteri Primer" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Jalan Kabupaten" REMARK "Jalan Kolektor Primer" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Jalan Kabupaten" REMARK "Jalan Kolektor Primer (JKP4)" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Jalan Kabupaten" REMARK "Jalan Kolektor Primer Empat (JKP4)" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK "Jalan Non Status" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK "Tidak Ada" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" WADMKK "Kabupaten Bantaeng" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" WADMPR "Provinsi Sulawesi Selatan" VB #
ExtendLine "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" "10 Meters" EXTENSION
TrimLine "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" "10 Meters" DELETE_SHORT
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK "JKP4 & [REMARK] " VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK [REMARK] VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK ""JKP4 " & [REMARK]" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" SBDATA "SK Jalan Provinsi Tahun 2019" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" SBDATA "Keputusan Bupati Bantaeng No. 600/299/V/2017" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" SBDATA "Keputusan Bupati Bantaeng No. 600/299/V/2017" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" SBDATA "RBI Skala 1:50.000 Updating Citra Satelit Spot 7 Tahun 2017" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK [NAMOBJ] VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK "Tidak Ada" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" SBDATA "RBI Skala 1:50.000 Updating Citra Satelit Spot 7 Tahun 2017" VB #
TrimLine "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" "10 Meters" DELETE_SHORT
ExtendLine "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" "10 Meters" EXTENSION
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" SBDATA "Peta RBI Skala 1:50.000, 2017 Update Citra Spot 7, 2020" VB #
TrimLine "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" "5 Meters" DELETE_SHORT
ExtendLine "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" "2 Meters" EXTENSION
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" SBDATA "Kepmen PUPR No. 367/KPTS/M/2023" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK "!REMARK! .title()" PYTHON_9.3 #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK "Ruas Boro – Bantaeng" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK "Ruas Kalamassang - Moti" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK "Ruas Letta - Pullaweng" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK "Ruas Moti - Borong Kapala" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK "Ruas Nipa-Nipa - Bannyorang" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK ""ruas " & [REMARK]" VB #
CalculateField "Sistem Jaringan Transportasi" REMARK "Makassar - Takalar - Bulukumba - Watampone" VB #
